segments: Gina : Hey Jon! Good to see you. What ' s up? Anything new? Jon : Hey Gina! Good to see you too. Lost my job as a banker yesterday I gonna take a shot at starting my own business. Gina : Sorry about your job Jon, starting your own business sounds awesome! Unfortunately lost my job at Door Dash this month. What business are you thinking of? Jon : Sorry to hear that! I ' starting a dance studio ' cause passionate about dancing great to share it with others. Gina : That ' s cool, Jon! What got you into this biz? Jon : I ' ve been into dancing since was a kid my passion and escape. start a dance studio can teach others joy dancing brings me. Gina : Wow Jon, same here! Dance is my go - to for stress relief. Got any fave styles? Jon : Cool, Gina! love all dances, contemporary is my top pick. expressive and powerful! What ' s your fave? Gina : Yeah, me too! Contemporary dance is expressive and graceful - speaks to me. Jon : Wow, great idea! s go to dance class much fun! Gina : Yeah! explore new dance moves. plan a dance session soon! Jon : Yeah! Wanna see my moves next Fri? Can ' t wait! Gina : Sounds great, Jon! Next Friday works. Let ' s boogie! Jon : excited too! This gonna be great! Gina : Wow! What did you get? Jon : pic ' s from when my dance crew took home first in local comp last year. amazing up on stage! keen to spread intensity with other peeps. Gina, you ever been in any dance comps or shows? Gina : used to compete in few dance competition s and shows - fav memory was when my team won first place at a regionals at age fifteen.awesome feeling of accomplishment! Jon : Wow! Winning first place amazing! What dance you doing? Gina : Thanks! did contemporary piece called " Finding Freedom. " emotional and powerful. Jon : Wow must ' ve been great! Check my ideal dance studio by water. Gina : Cool setup! Man can ' t deny that view! Got time to rehearse with biz and new store? Jon : Hopefully find a place like this inspire us! Gina : Wow, looks great! What dances you practice? any projects planned? Jon : Thanks! rehearsed with small group of dancers after work. do all kinds of dances, from contemporary to hip-hop. cool projects in works. Finishing up choreography to perform at nearby festival next month. Can ' t wait! Gina : Wow, it looks awesome! Are they yours at festival? They so graceful! Jon : Yeah they ones performing at festival! been practicing hard impress with their grace and skill. Gina : Wow, they look great! Can ' t wait to see them rock the festival. Gonna be awesome! Jon : Yeah, awesome! Glad to be part of it.

Gina : Hey Jon! Long time no see! Things hectic lately. launched ad campaign for my clothing store in hopes of growing business. Starting my own store taking risks is scary and rewarding. excited to see where it takes me! Jon : Hey Gina! Whoa your store looks great! All your hard work paid off - congrats! Must be awesome to see your stuff on display. Gina : Thanks a bunch! awesome seeing my vision happen. How ' s the dance studio going? find right spot? Jon : Hey Gina! Thanks for asking. ' on hunt for ideal spot for my dance studio s been quite a journey! been looking at different places picturing how space would look. found a place with great natural light! been to Paris yesterday! sooo cool. Gina : Wow, nice spot! Where is it? Got any other features want to think about before you decide? Paris?! That really great Jon! Never had chance to visit it. Been only to Rome once. Jon : It ' s downtown awesome cuz easy to get to. Plus natural light! Gotta check size & floor quality. need good dance floor with enough bounce for me & students to dance safely. Gina : Definitely! Dance floors help avoid injuries make dancing more enjoyable. thinking about it is great. Any particular type of flooring you like? Jon : good flooring ' s crucial. after Marley flooring, dance studio s usually use. It ' s great ' cause s grippy but still lets you move, plus tough and easy to keep clean. Gina : Sounds great! Marley ' s perfect ; s got right amount of grip and movement. Can ' t wait to see your dance studio done! Jon : can ' t wait to see it done! Looking for the right place getting everything ready mix of exciting and nerve - wracking, but determined to make it work.It ' ll be worth it! Gina : Believe in yourself, Jon! process may be tough you got this. Push through ll be worth it. Don ' t forget to take breaks dance it out when need destress! Jon : Glad I have you in my corner! Gotta make time to dance vent, for sure. ' ll make it through this - hang in there! Gina : Thanks, Jon! Appreciate your support! Jon : Let keep going chase our dreams! Gina : Yeah! ' done so much, nothing but good stuff coming. keep going after our goals making them happen. Jon : Success is almost here. We got this

Jon : Hey Gina, hope you ' re doing ok! Still following my passion for dance. ' s been bumpy, but determined to make it work. still searching for place to open my dance studio. Gina : Hi Jon! happy you re pushing forward with dancing! Inspiring emailed wholesalers one replied said yes today! ' m over the moon because now can expand my clothing store get closer to customers. Check it out - here ' s a pic! Jon : Wow, Gina! found perfect spot for your store. Way to go, hard work ' s paying off! Gina : Thanks! Glad you like it. great spot. Here ' s a peek at space I designed. Cozy and inviting - perfect for customers to check out trendy pieces. Jon : Wow it looks great! Must ' ve taken ages to design it. What made pick out furniture and decor? Gina : Thanks! took bit of time wanted to make place look like my own style make customers feel cozy. chose furniture that looks great comfy too. chandelier adds nice glam feel while matching style of store. Jon : Your store looks great - your customers will be so comfy. Gina : Thanks! Making my spot comfortable and inviting for customers is key. want ' em to feel like they ' in cool oasis. creating experience ' ll make ' em come back. Jon : great goal! Creating special experience for customers is key to making them feel welcome and coming back. can create that space ' re imagining. Gina : Thanks. Your support means a lot. sure with hard work and effort, can make special shopping experience for customers. ' s tough but ' m up for the challenge! Jon : always here to support you! Go create something awesome with your store. Keep it up! Gina : Thanks, Jon! I ' ll try my best.You ' re gonna do great with your dance studio keep going stay positive! We ' ll get through this! Jon : Thanks! Your words mean a lot. I staying positive pushing forward. put hearts into our dreams sure we ' ll make it. Gina : Sure thing, Jon! Stay motivated keep going. Hard work pays off eventually. We can do this

Jon : Hey Gina! What ' s up? How ' s the store going? tell you about this thing with my biz. Gina : Hey Jon! The store ' s doing great! s a wild ride. How ' s the biz? Jon : Hey Gina! m putting in a lot of work on my business even with obstacles. I ' gonna make it happen! Gina : Wow! You ' ve got drive! Keep it up make a splash. Jon : Thanks Gina! Your help means a lot. Sometimes s hard when things don ' t go my way, but sure if keep pushing, ll reach my dreams! Gina : Understand where you ' re at, Jon. Setbacks are opportunities for comebacks. got skills, passion, drive. Plus my full support. Don ' t give up, buddy! Jon : Thanks! Setbacks can be tough, but with your support, can handle anything. Appreciate you having my back! Gina : ' m here for you no matter what! Anything want to say about your biz? Jon : Searching for dance studio location tricky determined to find right spot - when sure rest will follow! Gina : Searching for perfect dance studio ' s tough job, Jon. Hang in there ' ll find it soon! Jon : Thanks! Appreciate your encouragement - it means a lot! working on my business new dance routines - rehearsing hard for upcoming show. passionate about dancing brings me much joy and fulfillment. Gina : Wow, Jon! You so talented! What show ya got planned? Jon : getting ready for a dance comp near me next month. great chance for to show my skillz get props from dance fam. Super stoked! Gina : Wow Jon, gonna kill it in that competition. Your hard work and talent will pay off! Good luck. Jon : Thanks! Your help means a lot. ll do my best to make you proud! Gina : No doubt, Jon you ' ve got this.passion commitment awesome! Keep it up! Jon : Thanks! going for my dreams! Gina : Absolutely Jon. always here to cheer you on. Make dreams happen - keep going believe in yourself. You got this! Jon : Thanks, Gina! kind words mean a lot. won ' t give up

Gina : Hey Jon! Great hearing from you again. How have you been? BTW, found cool new fashion piece for my store. Can ' t wait to share with customers. Jon : Hey Gina! Congrats on new fashion piece! Looks like your store is growing. Remenber the festival I told you about? Had that performance awesome - so many people there complementing my dance moves. Dancing brings me joy nice to be reminded why I ' m passionate about it. Gina : Wow! looks great. You look badass on stage. BTW, ' s your favorite part of running your own studio? Jon : Thanks, Gina! love running my own studio. great having freedom to create a space help dancers of all ages and levels express themselves. super thrilled about dancing each day seeing students progress. fulfilling. Gina : That ' s awesome! sure feel great knowing your students are doing so well with dance. amazing what it can do for people! btw - been working hard on my online store teamed up with a local artist for cool designs. Check ' em out! Jon : It looks awesome. Your commitment and creativity in your business stands out. How ' you come up with these cool designs? Gina : Thanks Jon! got idea from a fashion mag saw there wasn ' t much around like it. worked with the artist to make it happen - s all about being ahead of the game giving customers something different. Jon : Nice one, Gina! never shy away from a challenge always try something new. impressed by your willingness to take risks - inspiring. Gina : Thanks! Taking risks is scary but only way to grow,? part of journey to success. Jon : agree - taking risks is key for success. ' s made me grow, got me out of my secure 9 - 5 as a banker. Now aiming to turn my dancing passion into a business.determined to make it work, just know it! said, don ' t underestimate difficulties - it ain ' t been a walk in the park, ' s for sure. Gina : tough starting a biz, but don ' t let it get you down. can make your studio work, sure. remember, always here for you. Jon : Thanks, Gina. Your help means a lot. ll keep plugging away stay optimistic. Gina : quote kept me positive through tough times. need a push sometimes, right? Even made a tattoo to remind myself about it. Jon : Love the tattoo, did you get it? Gina : Thanks! Got tattoo few years ago stands for freedom - dancing without worrying what people think. reminder to follow my passions express myself. Jon : Nice reminder, Gina! important to have freedom express ourselves without worry. Dance gives me escape to be myself. Gina : Totally agree, Jon. Dancing lets us be ourselves ain ' t nothing like feeling it gives us. dedicated to your studio s inspiring. Chase those dreams, buddy! Jon : Thanks, Gina! Your support means so much. gonna keep chasing after dreams. Dance is my passion, keep working hard to make it success! Gina : right attitude! juggling dance and business goals? Jon : Thanks! Juggling both my passions can be tricky, but rewarding. Dancing and running my biz need hard work, plus they give me energy for each other. My dance moves get me pumped to tackle business goals, successes there boost my drive to keep dreaming on dance floor. balancing act, but fun. Gina : Wow, Jon! amazing at juggling both your passions. Finding happy medium is key - keep going don ' t stop dreaming, buddy! Jon : Thanks, Gina! Your pep - talk really meant a lot' not gonna give up on dreams - dance studio biz ventures need hard work putting in. Love having you in my corner thanks for always being there! Gina : Yeah Jon, I ' m here for you! Chasing dreams helping each other out. Let ' s keep movin ' forward

Jon : Hi Gina! Been hectic for me lately. Started hitting gym last week to stay on track with venture. Gotta figure out how to balance it all, but it ' s going well. How about you? Gina : Hey Jon! Great to hear from you. Been having tough times lately. Jon : Oof, sorry to hear that. What ' s up? anything I can do to help? Gina : Thanks, Jon! Appreciate your offer. Since lost my job at Door Dash, things tough. here ' s good news - got something to share! Jon : Wow ' s awesome! Can ' t wait to hear it! Gina : My online clothes store is open! been dreaming of this for a while now - can ' t wait to see what happens! Jon : Congrats! ' s awesome! What gave you idea to start the online store? Gina : Thanks! passionate about fashion trends finding unique pieces. wanted to blend my love for dance and fashion, perfect match. Jon : Wow awesome! Combining two interests into store is super cool. Best of luck with it! Gina : Thanks! How is biz going? hope it ' s going well! Jon : Thanks for askin ', Gina! Losing my job was hard, ' livin ' my dreams now. Startin ' my biz tough but ' gonna make it! keep facing new challenges, sure it ' ll be worth it in the end. Gina : starting and running my own biz had ups and downs - amazing ride! Jon : a rollercoaster. your success inspires me to keep pushing forward. Your determination is awesome! Gina : Thanks, Jon! Your words encouraging. Glad my journey is inspiring othersJon : Yeah, totally! It ' s great we both face same challenges motivates us like having a partner to dance with! Gina : Yep! We re both on different paths nice to have someone to root for us. We can do it! Jon : Definitely! Having someone back us up is great. Let ' s keep going reach success together! Gina : keep chasing our dreams supporting each other celebrating achievements. can do great things together! Jon : Yeah, Gina, thanks for having my back. Here ' s to taking on new heights all trials come with it. Cheers

Jon : Hey Gina, how ' s it going? Gina : Hey Jon, my online clothing store a roller coaster rewarding. Starting a business takes courage - you hang in there too! Jon : Thanks Gina! ' s been tough, but I ' m gonna make it happen. s been great! you ' re awesome with your store. How ' s it going? Gina : Thanks! Appreciate your kind words. Store ' s going good, keeping up with fashion trends can offer best pieces to customers. been a lot of work, enjoying it. any advice or tips on running a successful biz? Jon : brand identity is key. Make sure yours stands out. to build relationships with your customers let them know you care. don ' t forget to stay positive motivate others. Your energy contagious! Gina : Thanks for advice, Jon! Building relationships creating strong brand image for my store always working on. right staying positive is key. What helps you stay motivated with your dance studio business? Jon : students succeed motivates me. awesome to help them learn reach goals. Your support, Gina, means a lot too. photo of us after during dance clases. Gina : awesome, Jon! students grow succeed must be fulfilling. Glad I can be part of this journey! Jon : Thanks for being there for me! made a huge difference feels great. Gina : Glad I could help, Jon! nice to be part of something positive. Supporting your dreams awesome! Jon : Thanks for being there for me. Your help means a lot. Gina : ' m here for you, rooting for you all the. Jon : Thanks, grateful for your help with staying motivated. Gina : Glad to cheer you on. Keep going never give up! Jon : Thanks, Gina! won ' t quit - your words motivate me to keep going! Gina : Believe in yourselfEven when it ' s tough you got this! Keep going! Jon : I gonna keep believing in myself. Thanks for kind words

Jon : Hey Gina, had to shut down my bank account. It was tough, but needed to do it for my biz. Gina : Oh no, Jon! Sorry to hear that. Tough decision for you? How ' re you handling changes? Jon : tough call, but thought it ' d help my biz grow. Handling changes hard, but staying positive looking ahead. Anything new for you? Gina : Oof, ' s tough, Jon. got new offers and promotions going on my online store to bring in new customers. s been wild ride starting my business, not giving up! Jon : Nice one, Gina! Love how you never give up. What helps you stay motivated? Gina : Thanks Jon! Dance is my stress relief and fashion fuels my creativity. love finding new trends for my store. keeps me motivated to keep growing. Check out this pic of fave dance session! Jon : Wow, s great! What made combine clothing biz and dance? Gina : Thanks! passionate about dance and fashion combining them lets me show creativity share my love with others. Plus can add dance - inspired items to my store! Jon : Nice work! Combining passions is always cool. How ' s it going? Gina : Thanks! good - customers love new offers and promotions seeing more sales. People to like my designs, always on hunt for unique, trendy pieces. Growing my customer base is main focus now. Jon : Sounds like all your effort ' s paying off. Anything planned to grow your customer base? Gina : Yeah have few plans. thinking of working with fashion bloggers and influencers in next few months to get more attention for my store. Plus going to do more ads can reach more people. focused on building my customer base and making my store a top destination for fashion fans.awesome to see it all coming together! You, Jon? What do you have going for your dance studio? Jon : Thanks, Gina! expanding my dance studio ' s social media presence offering workshops classes to local schools and centers hosting a dance comp etition next month to showcase local talent bring more attention to my studio. work ' s paying off - seeing progress dancers excited. great feeling to give place where people can express themselves through dance! Gina : Wow! fantastic your studio ' s expanding giving dancers an outlet. proud of progress you made - keep it up! Jon : Thanks! Your backing means a lot. trying to make my plan work, tough. Your encouragement helps. you coming to the event next month? Love to have you there! Gina : Woah, cool event! What ' s gonna be happening? love to join in show my support! Jon : Thanks, Gina! My dance studio and some other schools bringing best moves for awesome night of performances and judging. super creative and fun. Come join us! Gina : Sounds great! definitely in for the show. Jon : Cool! Can ' t wait to see you! Gina : Thanks, Jon! See you at the event! Jon : Gina, good luck with your store! Gina : Thanks, Jon! Appreciate kind words. < 3 Jon : Sure, I am always there for you! Gina : Thanks! Your support means a lot. keep pursuing my goals hope you do too! Jon : Thanks! won ' t quit on my dreams. Your words motivate me. Bye! Gina : Bye Jon! You got this! Believe in yourself and keep pushing. Take care!

Jon : Hey Gina! I turning my loves of dance into a business. sunk tons of time into studio lately, look at students - they ' re already killing it. learning with them! Gina : Hey Jon! Wow, way to take your passion make it into a biz! dance studio looks awesome. Jon : Thanks, Gina! determined to make this studio work. Losing my job was tough but gave me push I needed to do what I love. Gina : Woah, Jon! Tough times can be gateway to awesome things. Glad you worked up courage to go after your dreams! Jon : Yeah, Gina! s been tough, living my true self. Dancing makes me happy, now to share that with other people. Seeing students get better brings me such joy. Gina : Wow Jon, you look happy when you dance! Show world your true self keep dancing! Jon : Thanks a bunch, Gina! You seriously rock. Dancing for me is like way to express myself find my happy place. used to be scared to death of what people think, but learnt my own happiness is most important thing. been tough but also best thing ever! Gina : remember those dance classes! used to love spending time in studio. photo looks awesome, brings back lots of memories. nice to know, dance is still your happy place. Jon : Nice, Gina! happy dance has special meaning to both of us. cool way to express ourselves. loved taking lessons with friends when younger. memories are precious. glad can still enjoy it with my own studio. Thanks for always being there for me. Gina : Hey Jon! Got your back - dance is awesome for expressing yourself finding happiness. Here ' s one of my trophies from dance contest, nice reminder of hard work, dedication and joy it brings. Jon : Wow! It looks awesome! Thanks for the support, means a lot.Gina : No prob, Jon! earned kudos for hard work Keep it up! Jon : Thanks! keep pushing working hard Won ' t let anything hold me back! Gina : Way to go, Jon! Keep it up you ' re almost there

Jon : Hi Gina! wanted to fill you in on my business. Yesterday, went to a fair to show off my studio, both stressful and great! got possible leads, awesome. overall learned this biz is no cakewalk having confidence in yourself important for making it successful! Gina : Hey Jon, congrats on the fair! awesome to see your hard work paying off. Keep on pushing, pal, you headed for greatness. BTW, started my own online clothing store not long ago - pretty cool,? Jon : Thanks, Gina! Appreciate your support. Your store looks great, remember it! Gina : Thanks, Jon! After losing my job, wanted to take control of my own destiny seemed like perfect way to do it. tough journey, but very rewarding. Jon : Wow you ' re awesome for going for it! Setbacks can help us reach potential? having trouble with my business project. Any advice on staying motivated even when times are tough? Gina : Yeah Jon! Challenges awesome for learning and growth. To stay motivated, think of big goal and why I ' m doing it. get help from people who support me. dance it out. need advice on anything in particular? Jon : been feeling low on confidence lately. hard to run a business when don ' t have faith in yourself. tips on how you stay confident in your business? Gina : I get it, Jon. Confidence important in business. stay motivated by reminding myself of my successes and progress helps to have good support system. focus on why you started this because you love it! Have faith in yourself, Jon. I do! Jon : Thanks! Your words mean a lot. Gotta focus on success and why I started. You ' re right, love it ' ll keep my confidence up. Gina : No worries, Jon! Sounds like what I said was helpfulYou incredibly talented passionate about dance. Don ' t forget, believe in yourself abilities. Tackle obstacle keep shining! Jon : Thanks! Your support means a lot. gonna keep going reach dreams no. Gina : Go for it, Jon! You got this! Don ' t let anything stop you. We ' re in this together! Jon : Appreciate your encouragement. keep pushing each other on this path. Gina : Yeah! Let ' s keep each other going. We can do it

Jon : Hi! Since we last spoke still working on dance studio things looking up! Gina : Hi! You inspiring taking it on opening your own studio! Jon : Thanks! Losing my job gave me push to finally start my dream business : my own dance studio! Now ' stepping into unknown hoping for best. Gina : must be scary stepping into unknown but know you can do it, Jon. With your determination and drive, your dance studio will huge success. Keep positive outlook keep going! Jon : Thanks! It ' s bit scary, but think about my love for dance how it makes me feel. s been my stress - buster since childhood! Gina : Gotcha, Jon! Dance is my stress fix too. soon start all worries vanish. amazing what we can do for our own mental health with something we enjoy. Jon : Yeah, Gina! Dancing helps me de - stress. ' s where I ' m most alive. must - have in my life. Gina : I get it, Jon. Dance is just me - - can ' t picture life without it. s like air. Jon :! Dancing is like second nature to me. living my dream by having my own dance studio teaching others. Gina : living dream inspiring others too! Your studio will change things for lots of folks. Jon : hope so, Gina. want to create a place for people to dance express themselves - s been dream of mine. Gina : great dream, Jon! Giving people place to express themselves with dance important. Your studio gonna make huge difference. Can ' t wait to see it happen! Jon : Thanks! Your help means a lot. Keep you posted on dance studio progress. Gina : Thanks! appreciate you keeping me in loop on this cool project. Can ' t wait to hear more watch it come to life!, btw, had interview for design internship yesterday! was so coolJon : Wow, Gina, stoked about this! Taking risk is scary sure following my dreams will pay off in end. How did interview go? Gina : It was great! Jon : Glad to hear it. Been practicing dance routines lately keeps mind focused motivated. Gina : Wow! ' great. Dancing awesome for staying focused. Wanna show me a routine sometime? Jon : Sure, Gina! Wanna see one of my routines? Lemme know when got time send you a vid. Gina : Yeah, Jon, watch your routine! proud of you! Jon : Thanks a lot! Your help means a lot. get video to you soon! Gina : No prob! Always here to help. Can ' t wait to see the vid

Gina : Hey Jon! Long time no talk! A lot ' s happened - accepted for fashion internship! Jon : Congrats, Gina! awesome news about fashion internship. stoked for you. Where is internship and how ' re you feelin ' about it? Gina : Thanks! ' excited and kinda nervous. Gonna be big change. part - time position in fashion department of an international company. Jon : Way to go, Gina! You stepped up. What ' s your plan for future? Gina : Thanks! mix of excited and scared to get into fashion, but trying to stay upbeat and learn as much as can. What about you? Got something new? Jon : currently reading " The Lean Startup " hoping ll give me tips for my biz. Gina : sounds great! Could it spark any ideas for your dance studio? Jon : book got me thinking about building a focused efficient business. Adapting and tweaking from customer feedback important, gonna try it out! Gina : Woah, Jon, whiteboard ' s got bunch of good ideas! How keep track and stay on schedule with dates? Jon : Thanks, Gina! helps me keep track of ideas and milestones. Gives me visual of my progress and keeps me organized. Gina : Nice idea! Having something visual can help with organizing and motivation. What ' you working on currently? Jon : wrapping up business plan looking for investors. passion for project and belief in success are driving me. Gina : Wow, Jon! Impressed by your commitment. How ' s hunt for investors going? Jon : Thanks! Searching for investors tough, but staying hopeful. ' s all a process learning a ton. Gina : Yeah Jon, got right attitude! Keep learning and growing through it all. Keep going!
